text:
“I saw that you were perfect, and I loved you. Then I saw that you were not perfect, and I loved you even more.”

- Angelita Lim
thread:
“I saw that you were perfect, and I loved you. Then I saw that you were not perfect, and I loved you even more.”

- Angelita Lim
reply:
honestly the first bit is just projection, wanting someone to fit your fantasy.
the second bit is where it gets real. you can't actually love someone until you've seen the ugly and stayed anyway.
